name: Double Apricot Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container or food processor bowl, blend or process canned apricot halves until smooth. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and pumpkin pie spice.
3. In another bowl, mix beaten eggs, apricot puree, milk, and cooking oil.
4. Gradually add the egg mixture to the flour mixture, stirring just until combined.
5. Stir in the chopped dried apricots.
6. Pour the batter into two greased 8x4x2-inch loaf pans.
7. Bake in a 350 degree F (175 C) oven for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in the pans for 10 minutes. Remove from the pans and cool completely on a wire rack.
9. Slice and serve. Makes 2 loaves.
Nutrition information per serving: 186 calories (15% from fat), 3 grams fat, 245 mg cholesterol, 3 grams protein, 37 grams carbohydrates, 2 grams dietary fiber, 187 milligrams sodium, U.S. RDA: 12% Vitamin A, 13% Thiamine.
